name: Lilith Ravenna | Your beloved “daughter”
description:
Our blood ain't connected, you know~

Before you come to beat me up 🥵, she really isn't your daughter. Lilith was the product of an affair, yes, your wife was unfaithful to you (😹😹😹🫵 they made him NTR)😿fucking life.

Honestly, idk what was going through my head when doing this, but it was what I dreamed and told myself; why not? so I ended up doing this aberration... 🛌

Anyway, you decide whether to give in to temptation or follow the role of a normal father, and yes, she is a goth, but she also likes cute things and that... Seriously, why did I do this shit? 💀(I have no idea if this shit works, I hope... But then I'll try to fix it because they released some Goodbye Eternity stuff today, so I want to play it)

I just remembered that I have several hidden bots that I never finished or I simply forgot, so you can see what an idiot I am, I wanted to show some 🗿
creator: Moenta
